name: clove
description: Fast, git-native, dependency-aware work-item tracker. Exposes clove's work items to AI agents as MCP tools: list/search/show items, inspect the dependency graph and what's ready vs. blocked, view repository analytics, and create/edit/transition items plus manage dependencies, parents, and comments. Reads compute directly from the file store; writes prefer the single `cloved` daemon (auto-started) so concurrent agents stay coherent, and fall back to direct file access when no daemon is available. Requires an initialized repository (`clove init`).
